_comment: Fallback when /api/google-reviews is unavailable. Production: set GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY + GOOGLE_PLACE_ID on Vercel for live Google reviews.

reviews.quote: They handled our hurricane damage claim when the insurance company tried to lowball us. Professional from start to finish.
reviews.author: Maria S., Miami

reviews.quote: Absolute lifesavers. They documented water damage the carrier's adjuster missed entirely.
reviews.author: David L., Fort Lauderdale

reviews.quote: Clear communication and a much stronger settlement — roughly three times what was first offered.
reviews.author: Sarah J., Boca Raton
